title: The Colors of a Horse
summary: Kimry Jelen is an equine artist and painter residing in a small town in the Oregon High Desert. Her work is inspired by the natural beauty of her surroundings and the horses she encounters. With a background in fashion design, she previously collaborated with Royal Robbins, a prominent figure in the early climbing community of Yosemite and the founder of Royal Robbins Clothing. Kimry has exhibited her artwork at significant events such as the World Equestrian Games in France and the Scottsdale Arabian Horse Show. She expresses her artistic philosophy by stating, "Painting is almost like sculpting—I feel the essence and character of landscapes and animals as the work unfolds." www.kimryjelen.com Instagram: @Colors_of_the_Horse  ___About The Centaur Podcast___  Camron Adibi is an advocate for horses, an experienced horseman and instructor. He specializes in fostering deep connections between humans and horses. As a PATH Certified Therapeutic Riding Instructor, Cam brings a wealth of knowledge and experience, complemented by graduate degrees in education and architecture/engineering. Throughout his career, he has collaborated with equine rescues and worked with Grand Prix dressage horses, thoroughbreds, miniature horses, and schoolmasters. If you want to learn more about Camron and his unique storytelling approach, be sure to tune into The Centaur Podcast.

title: A Ninth-Generation Circus Artist
summary: Sylvia Zerbini is a ninth-generation circus artist, raised by trapeze artists and wild animal trainers. She is a former star performer with Cavalia and Ringling Circus, captivating audiences worldwide. Today, she showcases her unique show, Grande Liberté, featuring a herd of Arabian horses at prestigious venues. When not performing, Sylvia teaches equine liberty and aerial fitness, and she hosts intimate performances at her Grande Liberté Farm in Williston, Florida. You may pre-order the new book "Greatest Horse Trainer on Earth: The Sylvia Zerbini Story" by Rebecca Didier on Amazon.
